---
title: "Zero Trust Network Access"
subtitle: "A technical genealogy of an architectural break"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-expand: 3
description: ""
author: 
  - name: Antonio Montano
    orcid: 0009-0007-2429-1921
    email: antonio.montano.contact@gmail.com
    affiliation:
      - name: 4M4
        city: Milano
        country: Italia
date: "2025-10-22"
date-modified: "2025-10-25"
categories: [cybersecurity, 🇬🇧]
keywords: pippo
license: "CC BY-NC-ND"
copyright: 
  holder: Antonio Montano
  year: 2022-2025
citation: true
image: "era-stream-experience.png"
comments: 
  utterances:
    repo: antomon/antomon-utterances
    theme: github-light
tbl-cap-location: bottom



draft: true
---

::: {.column-margin}
![](era-stream-experience.png)
:::
